'''Brangus Glee''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], [[Color/Legends|brown]]-skinned member of a [[Brangus Glee's species/Legends|dexterous species]] of renowned travelers. He hailed from [[Dor Nameth]], but had left his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] he was considered an elder. During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], Glee traveled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and frequented [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]], [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]], and [[Casino/Legends|casinos]], [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] when at the latter.<ref name="ccg" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|'The thinker' among aliens?|Caption of an image of "Alien 23", a maquette that later became Brangus Glee, referencing [[Wikipedia:The Thinker|the famous statue]]|<ref name="Chronicles">''[[Star Wars Chronicles]]''</ref>}}
[[File:The_thinker_among_aliens.png|thumb|left|200px|A maquette of "Alien 23"]]
Brangus Glee's origins date back to the production stages of the [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], when maquettes of a number of [[Alien/Legends|aliens]] were constructed in preparation for scenes taking place in [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Palace]]. Several of the alien concepts, including a brown-skinned one known among the film's crew as "Alien 23", were scrapped after the maquette stage and not included in the film.<ref name="Chronicles" /> The maquette for Alien 23 had been sculpted by [[Ken Ralston]].<ref name="Indiana">{{YouTube|video=kzWqHmjdZZ0|text=BTS - Return of the Jedi's Creatures | Full Panel #indianacomicconvention #starwarshistory #rotj|channel=@FanXComicConventions|name=FanX Comic Conventions|date=2025-03-29}}</ref>

In [[1998]], the ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]] included a card that identified a modified image of the maquette<ref name="ccg" /><ref name="Chronicles" /> as an alien named Brangus Glee and provided some background information on the character. Alien 23 thus became a part of ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]].<ref name="ccg" />
